video_info.title: UFC Fight Night - Song vs Figueiredo
video_info.shortDescription: UFC Fight Night headlines with a thrilling bantamweight showdown between Song Yadong and Deiveson Figueiredo. Song Yadong brings explosive striking, speed, and rising momentum as he looks to strengthen his position in the division, while former flyweight champion Figueiredo aims to showcase his power, experience, and finishing ability in another high-stakes main event. Tune in to catch all the action from UFC Fight Night, LIVE on Sony LIV.

video_info.title: European Qualifiers For 2026 FIFA World Cup
video_info.shortDescription: Scotland take on Curaçao in an exciting international friendly as both sides continue preparations ahead of upcoming competitive fixtures. Scotland will look to make the most of home support with a disciplined and attacking display, while Curaçao aim to test themselves against strong opposition and showcase their flair and counterattacking quality in what promises to be an entertaining encounter. Catch all the action from the International Friendlies, LIVE on Sony LIV.
